name: gitcite
description: Single-file, client-side BibTeX reference manager with GitHub save. WCAG 2.2 AAA.

scripts.start: npm run build && npx --yes serve dist -l 8080 --no-clipboard
scripts.deploy:pages: npm run build && echo "dist/index.html ready — pushed to main triggers .github/workflows/pages.yml"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
